# הפועל ירושלים אוהדים — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Official website for Hapoel Jerusalem basketball club, one of Israel's top basketball teams. The site is designed to serve dedicated fans with live updates, game broadcasts, and a full schedule of matches. The brand carries strong local Jerusalem identity and passionate sports culture, targeting loyal supporters who want to stay connected with the team.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://hapoel-jerusalem-ohadim.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://hapoel-jerusalem-ohadim.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About הפועל ירושלים אוהדים
Official website for Hapoel Jerusalem basketball club, one of Israel's top basketball teams. The site is designed to serve dedicated fans with live updates, game broadcasts, and a full schedule of matches. The brand carries strong local Jerusalem identity and passionate sports culture, targeting loyal supporters who want to stay connected with the team.

## Target Audience
- אוהדי קבוצת הפועל ירושלים
- אוהדי הפועל ירושלים
- חובבי ספורט
- משפחות מקומיות

## Industry
Sports / Basketball Club

---

- Robots: https://hapoel-jerusalem-ohadim.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://hapoel-jerusalem-ohadim.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
